title: nephrodium sparsum var. nitidulum
intro: Nephrodium sparsum var. nitidulum, also known as the glossy nephrodium, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a type of fern. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium sparsum var. nitidulum include reducing inflammation and providing relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
